title: trifolium nigrescens
intro: Trifolium nigrescens, also known as the dark-leaved clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium nigrescens include its ability to support digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Trifolium nigrescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
